recipes.name: Mediterranean-Inspired Chopped Salad
steps: Wash and dice the green and red bell peppers, and finely dice the red onion.
Mince the garlic cloves.
Halve the cherry tomatoes.
Carefully dice the avocado.
In a large bowl, combine the diced bell peppers, red onion, minced garlic, halved cherry tomatoes, and diced avocado.
Drizzle with olive oil, then add salt and black pepper to taste.
Gently toss all ingredients together until well combined. Serve immediately.

recipes.name: Roasted Rosemary Bell Peppers & Tomatoes
ingredients: 1 green bell pepper, cut into strips
1 red bell pepper, cut into strips
2 sprigs fresh rosemary, leaves picked and roughly chopped
steps: Preheat your oven to 400°F (200°C).
Wash and cut the green and red bell peppers into strips, and the red onion into wedges.
Thinly slice the garlic cloves and pick the leaves from the rosemary sprigs, then roughly chop them.
In a large baking dish or on a baking sheet, combine the bell pepper strips, red onion wedges, sliced garlic, and cherry tomatoes.
Drizzle with olive oil, then sprinkle with chopped rosemary, salt, and black pepper.
Toss everything together until the vegetables are evenly coated.
Roast in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender and slightly caramelized, stirring halfway through.
Serve warm as a side dish.

recipes.name: Creamy Avocado & Tomato Mash with Rosemary
steps: Halve the avocados, remove the pit, and scoop the flesh into a medium bowl.
Using a fork, mash the avocado roughly, leaving some chunks for texture.
Quarter the cherry tomatoes.
Very finely dice the red onion and mince the garlic clove.
Finely chop the fresh rosemary.
Add the quartered cherry tomatoes, diced red onion, minced garlic, and chopped rosemary to the mashed avocado.
Drizzle with olive oil, then add salt and black pepper to taste.
Gently fold all ingredients together until just combined. This mash is versatile and can be enjoyed as a side, dip, or topping.
